# stop(_:)

**Instance Method**

Stops rendering a composition in a view.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBAction @MainActor func stop(_ sender: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object (such as a button or menu item) sending the message to stop rendering. You need to connect the object in the interface to the action.

## Discussion

The method is invoked when the user clicks a button or issues a command from some other user interface element, such as a menu. It is equivalent to the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCView/stopRendering()] method.

## Using Interface Builder

- **play(_:)**: Plays or pauses a composition in a view.
- **start(_:)**: Starts rendering a composition in a view.
